---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for StarEscrow
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the specific use case or scenario where this feature would be beneficial.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Impact

- [ ] This is a breaking change
- [ ] This affects the contract interface
- [ ] This affects the CLI interface
- [ ] This affects documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear problem statement
- [ ] I have described a proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternative approaches
